holdings.infoBox: FTHF is an equity ETF with a total of 105 individual holdings. The top holdings are SK hynix stock at 16.60%, Samsung Electronics at 11.80%, Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company at 7.95%, Petróleo Brasileiro S.A. - Petrobras at 4.80%, and MediaTek at 3.24%.

overview.description: The First Trust Emerging Markets Human Flourishing ETF (FTHF) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Emerging Markets Human Flourishing index. The fund tracks a market cap-weighted index of large- and mid-sized emerging market companies that adequately promotes human flourishing. Securities are screened on their human rights beliefs and are selected based on their fundamentals. FTHF was launched on Oct 30, 2023 and is issued by First Trust.
